title: Senior Teacher - Lido Learning - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Lido Learning - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Lido Learning invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lido Learning:
Lido Learning is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lido Learning!
